_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MBH Bedrock
author: cennacdude@proton.me
description: A lightweight hibernation proxy for Minecraft Bedrock servers. Sits in front of your Bedrock server and keeps it shut down while idle, automatically starting it the moment a player tries to connect saving resources without requiring players to do anything special to join.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

apt update
apt install -y zip unzip wget curl jq

cd /mnt/server || { echo "Failed to change directory to /mnt/server"; exit 1; }

# Backup config files before install
echo "Backing up config files"
mkdir -p /tmp/config_backup
cp -v server.properties /tmp/config_backup/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp -v permissions.json /tmp/config_backup/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp -v allowlist.json /tmp/config_backup/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp -v mbh_config.json /tmp/config_backup/ 2>/dev/null || true

echo "Finding latest MBH release asset from GitHub"
API_URL="https://api.github.com/repos/Cennac2/minecraft_bedrock_hibernation/releases/latest"

DOWNLOAD_URL=$(curl -fsSL "$API_URL" | jq -r '.assets[] | select(.name == "mbh-linux-x86_64") | .browser_download_url')

if [ -z "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" ] || [ "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" = "null" ]; then
    echo "Failed to find asset mbh-linux-x86_64 in the latest release."
    exit 1
fi

echo "Downloading MBH from: $DOWNLOAD_URL"
curl -fsSL -L -o mbh-linux-x86_64 "$DOWNLOAD_URL"

echo "Renaming binary to mbh"
mv -f mbh-linux-x86_64 mbh
chmod +x mbh

echo "Installing Bedrock server"
RANDVERSION=$(echo $((1 + $RANDOM % 4000)))
BEDROCK_VERSION=${BEDROCK_VERSION:-latest}
DOWNLOAD_FILE="bedrock-server-installer.zip"

if [ "${BEDROCK_VERSION}" = "latest" ]; then
    echo "Finding latest Bedrock server version"
    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(curl --silent https://net-secondary.web.minecraft-services.net/api/v1.0/download/links | jq -r '.result.links[] | select(.downloadType == "serverBedrockLinux") | .downloadUrl')
    if [ -z "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" ] || [ "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" = "null" ]; then
        echo "Failed to retrieve the latest Bedrock server version."
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "Downloading ${BEDROCK_VERSION} Bedrock server"
    DOWNLOAD_URL="https://www.minecraft.net/bedrockdedicatedserver/bin-linux/bedrock-server-${BEDROCK_VERSION}.zip"
fi

echo "Download URL: $DOWNLOAD_URL"

curl -fsSL -L \
  -A "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/90.0.${RANDVERSION}.212 Safari/537.36" \
  -H "Accept-Language: en" \
  -o "${DOWNLOAD_FILE}" \
  "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

echo "Unpacking server files"
unzip -o "${DOWNLOAD_FILE}"

echo "Cleaning up after installing"
rm -f "${DOWNLOAD_FILE}"

echo "Restoring backup config files"
cp -rfv /tmp/config_backup/* /mnt/server/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No files to restore"

chmod +x bedrock_server

echo "Install Completed"

variables.name: Bedrock Version
variables.description:
The version of bedrock. (Ex. 1.7.0.13)

Default version is latest.

variables.name: Wait time before shutdown (seconds)
variables.description: The amount of time the server should wait before the server goes offline because of inactivity

variables.name: Server Hibernating motd
variables.description: What to display when the server is hibernating
